name: Infernal Guardian
location: Razor Master Erthas in City of Ash I, Glirion the Redbeard

bonuses.stat: When you apply a damage shield to yourself or an ally, you have a 50% chance to lob 3 mortars over 2 seconds at the furthest enemy from you that each deal 641 Flame damage to all enemies within 5 meters of the blast area. This effect can occur once every 6 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
